findings.message: Dedup contract is incorrect: `appendCompletedIdea()` does not accept/store raw `dispatch_id`; it derives `idea_key` as SHA1(`source_path::title`), so the stated `dispatch_id`-based completion path will not work without code changes.

Evidence audit is inaccurate: the generator already has unit tests (`scripts/src/startup-loop/__tests__/generate-process-improvements.test.ts`), so claiming 'no unit tests' is stale and lowers planning reliability.
